caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!", and a gold chain is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional microphone and wears over-ear headphones. The background is white with gold stars and repeating text that reads "GRINDED HUSTLE". To his right, a sign displays "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" in the lower-left and a red banner stating "BOSS TALK 101" in the lower-right. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his posture and facial expression while looking toward someone off-camera to his left. The lighting and camera angle remain static, capturing him from the waist up as he appears to be engaged in a conversation.
